def write_report(path, rows):
    with open(path, "w") as f:
        for row in rows:
            f.write(str(row["id"]))
            f.write(",")
            f.write(row["name"])
            f.write(",")
            f.write(str(row["score"]))
            f.write("\n")


def build_csv_string(records):
    parts = []
    for rec in records:
        parts.append(str(rec["id"]))
        parts.append(",")
        parts.append(rec["name"])
        parts.append(",")
        parts.append(str(rec["value"]))
        parts.append("\n")
    return "".join(parts)
